listings.act: DEPART — Thameslink to Kings Cross (~40 min). Get your tickets ready, grab platform drinks.
ARRIVE Kings Cross. Walk 5 min across to St Pancras International — follow signs, same building.
BOARD — Southeastern Javelin to Stratford International (~7 min, runs every 20 min). Tap contactless.
ARRIVE Stratford International. 20 min walk through Olympic Park to London Stadium — follow the crowd and signs.
GATES OPEN — Get in early, get beers in, find your spots. Support: Knocked Loose (first up) + Gojira.
GOJIRA — French metal gods. Do not miss this. Front or die.
METALLICA — Night 1. No Repeat Weekend: unique setlist tonight only. Welcome to the pit.
SHOW ENDS — Walk back to Stratford International, Javelin back to St Pancras, tube to hotel.
NOON CHECKOUT or bag drop. Recovery beers. Today is yours.
THE DEV (Devonshire Arms) — Start here. Metal pub, posters everywhere, eccentric crowd. Neck the first pint.
THE BLACK HEART — Down the alley off Camden High St. Best metal bar in London. Whiskey list, crushing volume.
THE WORLD'S END — Pint upstairs, then descend to The Underworld below. Metal Militia tribute night is HERE tonight.
METAL MILITIA TRIBUTE — The Underworld, 174 Camden High St. Doors 6pm. Metallica tribute. Go hard.
GARLIC & SHOTS — Soho. 101 shots, stone coffin downstairs, garlic in everything. Tactical stop.
THE HIPPODROME CASINO — No membership needed, walk in with ID. Blackjack, roulette, craps (only London casino with it), 8 bars, 24hr licence. Game on.
FOR YOUR EYES ONLY — City Road, Shoreditch. UK's largest gentlemen's club. 14,000 sq ft, 4 stages, 29 VIP booths, stag packages available. Open late.
ARISE. Westfield Stratford — food, water, paracetamol. Prep for round two.
DEPART hotel — head to Stratford International. Walk through Olympic Park, get in early.
GATES OPEN — Night 2. Support: Avatar + Pantera. Different lineup, different energy.
PANTERA — Reinvented, relentless. This is the one.
METALLICA — Night 2. Zero songs repeated from Friday. Full new setlist. This is why you came.
SHOW ENDS — Stratford International → St Pancras Javelin → Kings Cross. Check return trains before you go in.
DEPART — Thameslink from Kings Cross back to Letchworth Garden City (~40 min). You made it. Get home.
HOME. Recovery protocol engaged. Tell no one everything.
